It accurately states that `PREEMPT` selects `PREEMPT_BUILD`, which selects `PREEMPTION`, rather than claiming a stale direct select.

cbm.justification: Matches the GT on all required points: `#ifdef CONFIG_PREEMPTION` at `kernel/sched/core.c:6875`, definition at 6880, closing `#endif` at 6987, and `config PREEMPTION` at `kernel/Kconfig.preempt:92`. It correctly explains that `CONFIG_PREEMPT` reaches `PREEMPTION` indirectly via `PREEMPT_BUILD`, while `PREEMPT_RT` selects it directly.
